title: Launch HN: Bloomy (YC S26) – AI-powered mastery learning for K-12
description: Hi HN, I’m Alex Southmayd, the founder of Bloomy ( https://bloomylearning.com ) – an AI-powered mastery-learning platform for K-12 students. Bloomy provides students with an AI tutor alongside adaptive curriculum (right now Math, English Language Arts, and Writing). How it works: we diagnose students’ skill gaps, place them on personalized learning paths, and give them standards-aligned lessons and a Socratic AI tutor that scaffolds their learning without just giving away the answer.
